title: Deepslate To Mosss
description: This only changes your deepslate block texture mostly to hide your base.
body: With this Minecraft texture pack, all of the underground blocks will be changed to a moss style when applied to the game. The goal of this pack is to make your base harder to be found in a video, especially if you're playing on DonutSMP. Since the underground looks completely different with this pack, players will have a tougher time locating your base. It's also easy and straightforward to obtain.
